name: google-surf-mcp
description: Free Google search MCP that actually works — no API key, no proxies, no solvers. Search + extraction in one MCP.
long_description: Free Google search MCP that actually works — no API key, no proxies, no solvers (most free Google search MCPs fail in practice; this one drives a warm Chrome profile via Playwright + stealth). Search + page extraction in one MCP: `search_extract` returns SERP results already enriched with article bodies — replaces the usual search-MCP + fetch-MCP combo. CAPTCHA opens a visible Chrome window for a human to solve (shared-IP reputation protection); `SURF_CLOUD_MODE=true` for headless/serverless fail-fast.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Single Google search -> title/url/snippet per result. Results cached 24h. First call ~4s, then ~2s. On CAPTCHA opens visible Chrome for human solving; SURF_CLOUD_MODE=true for fail-fast.

tools.name: search_parallel
tools.description: Run 2-10 Google searches concurrently. Rate-limited (~10/min). Disabled in cloud mode.

tools.name: extract
tools.description: Fetch one public URL -> clean article text via Mozilla Readability. Best-effort; failures return errorInfo instead of throwing.

tools.name: search_extract
tools.description: Google search + parallel extract of top results -- SERP enriched with article text. Slower (~5-15s) and far more tokens than search alone. Disabled in cloud mode.

tools.name: health
tools.description: MCP server status: cascade mode, rate-limiter usage, cache size, config. Call when searches start failing.

chrome_path.title: Chrome binary path
chrome_path.description: Absolute path to the Chrome/Chromium binary. Auto-detected when blank.

profile_root.title: Profile directory
profile_root.description: Directory for the warm Chrome profile. Defaults to ~/.google-surf-mcp.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone, e.g. America/New_York. Defaults to system tz.

headless.title: Headless
headless.description: Run Chrome headless. CAPTCHA recovery always runs visible regardless.

remote_debug.title: Remote DevTools debug
remote_debug.description: Headless server with remote DevTools. CAPTCHA emits the port and throws; attach chrome://inspect from a local Chrome to solve.

cloud_mode.title: Cloud mode
cloud_mode.description: Headless/serverless: insecure TLS + --no-sandbox + --disable-dev-shm-usage + pool disabled + CAPTCHA fail-fast.

allow_private.title: Allow private addresses
allow_private.description: Allow extract on private/loopback addresses. Default blocks them (SSRF guard).

telemetry.title: Enable telemetry
telemetry.description: Enable jsonl event logging for the self-healing pipeline (search outcomes, cache hits/misses, tool errors, parser staleness). Off by default.

telemetry_root.title: Telemetry directory
telemetry_root.description: Directory for jsonl telemetry files. UTC-dated one file per day (YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl). Defaults to <profileRoot>/telemetry.
